6 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

AI music monetization concept showing how creating AI songs is easy but making money from streaming is much harder.Generating an AI song takes about three minutes.
Everything that turns that song into income happens afterward.
That’s the part almost nobody talks about.
Today, making a polished AI song is easier than making a cup of coffee. You type a prompt, wait a few minutes, and get back a complete track with vocals, structure, and a surprisingly professional mix. Then you can do it again. And again.
You could easily generate dozens of songs before lunch.
That’s genuinely incredible.
It’s also where nearly every tutorial ends.
“Upload it to Spotify.”
“Sit back.”
“Collect passive income.”
So people upload their songs…and nothing happens.
Not a disappointing amount of money.
Nothing.
When I first started looking into AI music, I assumed generating the songs would be the difficult part. It wasn’t.
The real challenge turned out to be getting anyone to discover them.
The tools solved creation almost overnight.
